The 71 anima commits + 19 hive commits + 16 hexa-lang commits + 3 void commits today are ALL from those repos' own parallel sessions, NOT cross-repo writes from THIS nexus session. discipline_summary.scope_clarification: DECLARED_READ_ONLY means 'this nexus session does not author writes to repo X', NOT 'repo X is dormant globally'. anima ran 71 cycles in its own session today — those are correctly out-of-scope for this nexus discipline check.
